description:
GIVEN a scheduled game has probable pitchers assigned
AND Hide Spoilers is ON

*NOTE:* Game Tile designs for reference - [https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99767&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|smart-link]

steps.action: WHEN a user views a scheduled game tile
steps.result:
THEN the scheduled game time is displayed in the upper left corner of the game tile
AND the team match up displays away team above home team
AND the team logos display to the left of the respective team name
AND probable pitcher information is not displayed
AND Broadcast Networks are displayed below the team match up

NOTE: If the tile has focus, the background will be white with black text. If the tile does not have focus, the background will be a dark gray with white text. "Broadcast Networks" will always be in gray text.
